interpretation_templates.conflict: Heavy, distorted low-frequency tones conveying the weight of armed confrontation.
interpretation_templates.peace_talks: A gentle, resolving harmonic movement suggesting diplomacy and cautious optimism.
interpretation_templates.civilian_impact: A mournful, sustained melody reflecting the human cost of conflict.
interpretation_templates.political_transition: A measured, rhythmic pattern echoing the mechanics of political change.
interpretation_templates.uncertainty: Syncopated, restless textures mirroring the confusion of unresolved tensions.
